mentions.note: Upgraded today; reservations coming through; inexpensive valuation; earnings support thesis of resilient leisure demand.

High-quality company wrongly hated during free fall from $168 to $110; strong fundamentals (vendor financing moat, best book of business, dividend raise, $10B buyback hike) justified pyramid buying; missed by charitable trust but accessible to individual investors.
Niche specialty chemicals and gases for satellites and semiconductors; interesting story; Cramer plans to research further with analyst; unknown at this time but promising.
Spectacular turnaround under CEO Winnie Park; beat guidance on SSS growth (15.4% vs 14.5%), EPS ($4.31 vs $4.00), and full-year guidance; stock tripled in 12 months with more room to run.
Up stock with best data center turbine book of business; nearly all data center customers require turbines; strong conviction hold for caller up 130%.
Large block trade at end of day created uncertainty; part of magical thinking era; prefer to wait for stock to come in and see if block holds before buying.

FDA approval of Icotide (first oral IL-23 antagonist for plaque psoriasis) major win masked by oil selloff; Skyrizi competitor with $22B+ addressable market; legal headwinds (baby powder suits) finally fading.
Down 30% despite great quarter and buyback; incredibly valuable property charging too little for advertising; would buy more at current oversold levels.

Strong Q4 execution with streamlined operations (8 to 4 brands), robust cash flow ($525M, +20% YoY), and resilient consumer across all income bands; digital and store investments unlocking organic growth.
Totally cell phone dependent; lacks sufficient 5G/non-phone exposure; needs merger partner to drive growth; not enough diversification.
Another 52-week low; in house of pain; cannot recommend; clear sell signal.
